namespace = antq_m10_second

# Gan Ying's Mission; ANTIQVITAS master plan §9; recipient=HAN
antq_m10_second.2000 = {
	type = country_event
	title = antq_m10_second.2000.title
	desc = antq_m10_second.2000.desc
	outcome = neutral
	fire_only_once = yes
	image = "gfx/interface/illustrations/event/antq_gan_ying.dds"
	dynamic_historical_event = {
		tag = XAR
		from = 97.1.1
		to = 98.1.1
		monthly_chance = 100
	}
	option = {
		name = antq_m10_second.2000.a
		historical_option = yes
		add_prestige = prestige_mild_bonus
	}
}

# Champa Founded; ANTIQVITAS master plan §9; CHAM-BIRTH; recipient=HAN
antq_m10_second.2016 = {
	type = country_event
	title = antq_m10_second.2016.title
	desc = antq_m10_second.2016.desc
	outcome = positive
	fire_only_once = yes
	dynamic_historical_event = {
		tag = XAR
		from = 192.1.1
		to = 193.1.1
		monthly_chance = 100
	}
	option = {
		name = antq_m10_second.2016.a
		historical_option = yes
		# CHAM-BIRTH; Linyi/Rinan local-mesh proxy, documented in docs/ASSUMPTIONS.md.
		location:amarendrapura = {
			create_country_from_location = {
				define_unique_country_tag = CPC
				change_country_name = CPC
				change_country_adjective = CPC
				change_country_color = map_CPC
				change_country_flag = CPC
				change_culture = culture:antq_austronesian
				change_religion = religion:antq_austronesian_religion
				change_government_type = government_type:monarchy
				add_reform = government_reform:antq_regional_kingship
				change_heir_selection = heir_selection:cognatic_primogeniture
			}
			add_core = c:CPC
		}
		every_owned_location = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					this = location:phon_nha
					this = location:visnupura
					this = location:vrddha_ratnapura
				}
			}
			change_location_owner = c:CPC
			add_core = c:CPC
		}
		add_prestige = prestige_mild_bonus
	}
}
